title: bitter glassy-jelly peruvian chicken liver salt-bake
description: a hearty, flavorful dish featuring chicken liver, salt-baked to perfection and served with a sweet and tangy bitter glassy jelly. enjoy this unique and delicious peruvian-inspired recipe as a main dish or appetizer.
instructions: line a baking sheet with parchment paper and arrange the chicken livers in a single layer.
sprinkle the coarse kosher salt evenly over the chicken livers.
bake for 20 minutes or until the chicken livers are cooked through and slightly caramelized.
meanwhile, in a medium saucepan combine the water, apple cider vinegar, honey, red pepper flakes, and black pepper.
bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce to a simmer and cook for 10-15 minutes or until the mixture has thickened slightly and formed a glaze.
remove the chicken livers from the oven and let cool slightly.
use a pastry brush to apply the glaze to the chicken livers, then sprinkle with fresh mint leaves and chopped cilantro.
serve warm and garnish with additional fresh mint leaves and a drizzle of lime juice, if desired.
if using egg whites, beat until stiff peaks form and spread over the top of the chicken liver mixture before baking.
